scripts.generate: corepack pnpm@11.14.0 --filter @mergora-internal/token-compiler generate && corepack pnpm@11.14.0 --filter @mergora-internal/registry-builder generate && node scripts/verify-workspace.mjs --gate generate
scripts.generated:check: corepack pnpm@11.14.0 --filter @mergora-internal/token-compiler check && corepack pnpm@11.14.0 --filter @mergora-internal/registry-builder generated:check
scripts.check: node scripts/verify-workspace.mjs && node scripts/verify-document-links.mjs && node --test registry/definitions/catalog.test.ts && corepack pnpm@11.14.0 --filter @mergora-internal/token-compiler check && corepack pnpm@11.14.0 --filter @mergora-internal/registry-builder generated:check && node scripts/verify-shadcn-client.mjs && eslint . && prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .changeset/config.json "*.md" ".github/**/*.{yml,yaml,md}" "apps/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,html}" "content/**/*.{json,ts,tsx,md,mdx}" "docs/**/*.md" "packages/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,md}" "registry/**/*.{json,ts,tsx,md}" "tooling/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,md}" "scripts/**/*.{mjs,mts}" "tests/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,md}" && corepack pnpm@11.14.0 run typecheck && corepack pnpm@11.14.0 run test
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .changeset/config.json "*.md" ".github/**/*.{yml,yaml,md}" "apps/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,html}" "content/**/*.{json,ts,tsx,md,mdx}" "docs/**/*.md" "packages/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,md}" "registry/**/*.{json,ts,tsx,md}" "tooling/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,md}" "scripts/**/*.{mjs,mts}" "tests/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,md}"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .changeset/config.json "*.md" ".github/**/*.{yml,yaml,md}" "apps/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,html}" "content/**/*.{json,ts,tsx,md,mdx}" "docs/**/*.md" "packages/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,css,md}" "registry/**/*.{json,ts,tsx,md}" "tooling/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,md}" "scripts/**/*.{mjs,mts}" "tests/**/*.{json,js,mjs,ts,tsx,md}"
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm@11.14.0 run typecheck:prerequisites && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && turbo run typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm@11.14.0 run test:parallel && corepack pnpm@11.14.0 run test:shared-output
scripts.test:browser: playwright test && playwright test --config tests/components/playwright.config.ts && playwright test --config tests/components/form-controls/playwright.diagnostics.config.ts && playwright test --config tests/web/playwright.config.ts
